A

add(T) - Method in class com.telenav.kivakit.metrics.core.aggregates.AggregateQuantumMetric
 
AggregateMetric<T> - Interface in com.telenav.kivakit.metrics.core
An aggregate metric is a metric for a set of measurements, added with Addable.add(Object)
AggregateQuantumMetric<T extends com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.numeric.Quantizable> - Class in com.telenav.kivakit.metrics.core.aggregates
A quantum aggregate metric is an AggregateMetric for arbitrary Quantizable objects.
AggregateQuantumMetric(MapFactory<Double, T>) - Constructor for class com.telenav.kivakit.metrics.core.aggregates.AggregateQuantumMetric

O

OBSERVATION - Enum constant in enum com.telenav.kivakit.metrics.core.Metric.MetricType
The metric is an observation in a histogram, such as the duration of a request

Q

quantum() - Method in class com.telenav.kivakit.metrics.core.aggregates.AggregateQuantumMetric
 
quantum() - Method in class com.telenav.kivakit.metrics.core.scalar.DoubleMetric
 
quantum() - Method in class com.telenav.kivakit.metrics.core.scalar.QuantumMetric
 
QuantumMetric<T extends com.telenav.kivakit.interfaces.numeric.Quantizable> - Class in com.telenav.kivakit.metrics.core.scalar
A quantum metric is a single measurement (as opposed to an AggregateMetric) with a BaseMetric.name(), BaseMetric.type(), BaseMetric.unit(), BaseMetric.description() and measurement().
QuantumMetric() - Constructor for class com.telenav.kivakit.metrics.core.scalar.QuantumMetric
 
QuantumMetric(QuantumMetric<T>) - Constructor for class com.telenav.kivakit.metrics.core.scalar.QuantumMetric
